channel.title: swadeshi on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in swadeshi on Tech Tracker

item.title: Tooter - India's swadeshi micro-blogging platform alternative to Twitter!
item.description: **<img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-WndozVJc9Ro/YLZ2omBjeVI/AAAAAAAAEu0/v4YSuPELDzITQXBUxXPNQjnGlJks6Es-wCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1622570655804058-0.png" alt="Tooter - India&rsquo;s swadeshi micro-blogging platform alternative to Twitter!" title="Tooter - India's swadeshi micro-blogging platform alternative to Twitter!"> ** Twitter is un-doubtedly the most popular and well build micro-blogging platform it has millions of users in India & Overseas they even accepted to comply with India new IT rules on June 01 but there will be some negative impacts on desi apps for sure as we know after TikTok ban Indian companies utilised this opportunity and created apps like TikTok and grown thier companies userbase and get profits that will increase nation economy and spike the potential of India developers.
